evals.prompt: Create an Excel budget spreadsheet with monthly columns (Jan-Dec), rows for Income, Rent, Utilities, Food, Transport, Entertainment, and a Total Expenses row with SUM formulas. Include a Savings row that calculates Income minus Total Expenses.
evals.expected_output: An Excel file with formulas, formatting, and financial model color coding
expectations: Uses openpyxl to create the spreadsheet
Includes SUM formulas for Total Expenses (not hardcoded values)
Includes a Savings formula (Income - Total Expenses)
Applies financial model color coding (blue for inputs, black for formulas)
Runs LibreOffice recalc to verify formula values

evals.prompt: I have an Excel file with a column of prices. Add a 10% tax column with formulas and a total row at the bottom.
evals.expected_output: Modified Excel file with formula-based tax column and total
expectations: Uses openpyxl to read and modify the existing file
Adds tax column with formula references (=cell*0.10) not hardcoded values
Adds a SUM total row at the bottom
